nasb.text: He gave me instruction and talked with me and said, “O Daniel, I have now come forth to give you insight with understanding.

esv.text: He made me understand, speaking with me and saying, “O Daniel, I have now come out to give you insight and understanding.

cnv.text: 他向我解釋，說：“但以理啊！現在我來，要使你有智慧，有聰明。

ccb.text: 他向我解释说：“但以理啊，我来是要使你有智慧和悟性。
